ddls:
CREATE TABLE "transactions" (
  "transaction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each transaction */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Identifier for the customer making the transaction */,
  "transaction_date" TEXT /* Date of the transaction */,
  "total_amount" REAL /* Total amount spent in the transaction */,
  "channel" TEXT /* Channel of the transaction (e.g., 'in-store', 'online') */,
  "store_id" INTEGER /* ID of the store where the transaction occurred (for in-store transactions) */,
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the employee who processed the transaction (for in-store transactions) */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Method of payment used (e.g., 'credit card', 'cash', 'digital wallet') */,
  "tax_amount" REAL /* Amount of tax applied to the transaction */,
  "discount_amount" REAL /* Total discount applied to the transaction */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("transaction_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "products" (
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product */,
  "product_name" TEXT /* Name of the product */,
  "category" TEXT /* Product category (e.g., 'Books', 'Electronics') */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the product */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the product */,
  "brand" TEXT /* Brand or manufacturer of the product */,
  "weight" REAL /* Weight of the product */,
  "dimensions" TEXT /* Dimensions of the product (e.g., '10x5x2 inches') */,
  "supplier_id" INTEGER /* ID of the supplier who provides the product */,
  "inventory_status" TEXT /* Current inventory status (e.g., 'in stock', 'out of stock') */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "transaction_items" (
  "transaction_item_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each transaction item record */,
  "transaction_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the associated transaction */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the purchased product */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product purchased in the transaction */,
  "discounted_price" REAL /* Price of the product after any discounts */,
  "total_item_cost" REAL /* Total cost of the item (quantity * discounted_price) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("transaction_item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transaction_items_transaction_id FOREIGN KEY ("transaction_id") REFERENCES transactions ("transaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transaction_items_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "associations" (
  "association_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each association rule */,
  "antecedents" TEXT /* Products that appear together in transactions (antecedents) */,
  "consequents" TEXT /* Products that are recommended based on the antecedents (consequents) */,
  "antecedent_support" REAL /* Support for the antecedents in the transaction dataset */,
  "consequent_support" REAL /* Support for the consequents in the transaction dataset */,
  "support" REAL /* Overall support for the association rule */,
  "confidence" REAL /* Confidence level of the rule */,
  "lift" REAL /* Lift of the rule indicating strength over random chance */,
  "leverage" REAL /* Leverage indicating the difference between the observed and expected frequency of the association */,
  "conviction" REAL /* Conviction which indicates the implication strength of the rule */,
  "rule_strength" REAL /* Composite metric combining multiple factors to indicate the overall strength of the rule */,
  "rule_type" TEXT /* Type of rule (e.g., 'cross-category', 'within-category') */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the association rule was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("association_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "customer_name" TEXT /* Full name of the customer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the customer */,
  "join_date" TEXT /* Date the customer joined the loyalty program */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the customer */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the customer */,
  "address" TEXT /* Customer's address */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Customer's phone number */,
  "last_purchase_date" TEXT /* Date of the customer's last purchase */,
  "total_spent" REAL /* Total amount the customer has spent across all transactions */,
  "loyalty_tier" TEXT /* Customer's loyalty tier (e.g., 'Gold', 'Silver') */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "recommendations" (
  "recommendation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each recommendation */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer for whom the recommendation is made */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the recommended product */,
  "reason" TEXT /* Reason for recommendation based on analysis */,
  "viewed" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the customer has viewed the recommendation */,
  "clicked" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the customer has clicked on the recommendation */,
  "purchased" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the customer has purchased the recommended product */,
  "sent_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the recommendation was sent to the customer */,
  "channel" TEXT /* Channel through which the recommendation was sent (e.g., 'email', 'SMS', 'in-app') */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("recommendation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_recommendations_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_recommendations_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)
